description_long: This object consists of three large, cylindrical blue metal storage tanks with visible rust and weathering, arranged within a fenced enclosure. The tanks are standard drum barrels, likely used for storing liquids such as oil or chemicals, and are grouped together on a dirt or concrete surface. The enclosure is made of chain-link fencing with metal posts, providing security and containment. The barrels are accompanied by an old, weathered cannon mounted on a wooden carriage, adding an unusual historical element to the scene. The ground shows footprints and some debris, suggesting the area is occasionally accessed. The overall setting appears industrial and utilitarian, with the barrels as the primary storage feature.
description: Three blue, rusted metal storage tanks are grouped inside a chain-link fenced enclosure, set on a dirt or concrete surface with a weathered cannon nearby.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the tops of the three blue barrels and the cannon, with the chain-link fence enclosing the area and the barrels arranged in a triangular formation.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a side view of the barrels and cannon, highlighting the weathered texture of the barrels and the wooden carriage of the cannon.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a direct look at the barrels from the front, with the cannon pointing outward and the barrels clearly visible in the foreground.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the barrels from behind the fence, with the tops of the barrels and the enclosure's structure most prominent.
